code:
import io
import string

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

let line = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut sum = 0
mut out = ""
mut first_num = true
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(b)
    if is_digit(b)
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        cur = 0
      end
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
      cur = 0
    else
      if in_num
        let val = cur * sign
        sum = sum + val
        if first_num
          out = "#{sum}"
          first_num = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{sum}"
        end
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        cur = 0
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let val = cur * sign
  sum = sum + val
  if first_num
    out = "#{sum}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{sum}"
  end
end

println(out)
